title: Internal exam marks still not visible
description: Our internal exam was completed and the faculty said marks were uploaded, but the portal still shows blank marks for my subject.

title: Marked absent in sessional test even after attending
description: I wrote the sessional test in full, but the portal shows me as absent and no marks are being counted.

title: Practical marks in portal do not match faculty sheet
description: The faculty announced my practical marks in class, but the portal is showing a lower value than what was recorded.

title: Elective internal marks missing after update
description: Most students in my elective can see their internal marks, but my section still shows no marks after the announced update.

title: SGPA has not changed after approved grade correction
description: My grade correction request was approved, but the SGPA on the portal is still showing the old value and transcript preview is wrong.

title: Lab course grade is blank in semester result
description: My semester result is available, but the laboratory course grade is still blank even though all assessments were completed.

title: Portal is showing the wrong letter grade
description: My numeric score is correct, but the system mapped it to a lower letter grade than the published grading policy.

title: Approved grade change has not updated on the portal
description: The faculty confirmed my grade revision was approved, but the portal and downloadable mark sheet still show the old grade.

title: Biometric attendance entries are missing
description: I attended classes and used the biometric scanner, but multiple days are missing from my attendance percentage in the portal.

title: Tutorial attendance is not synced in ERP
description: My tutorial faculty marked me present, but those classes are still missing from the ERP attendance page.

title: Approved medical leave was not counted in attendance
description: My medical leave was approved by the department, but my attendance percentage still dropped as if the leave was not considered.

title: Duty leave attendance for college event not updated
description: I was on approved college duty for an official event, but those classes are still marked absent in my attendance record.

title: Bonafide certificate request is still pending
description: I applied for a bonafide certificate for scholarship submission, but the request is still pending and the deadline is close.

title: Transcript request is stuck in verification
description: My transcript application has been in verification for several days and I need it for an external admission process.

title: Duplicate ID card letter has not been issued
description: I reported my lost ID card and applied for the supporting letter, but the administrative office has not issued it yet.

title: No-dues certificate is delayed despite clearances
description: I need a no-dues certificate for my internship paperwork, but the request is not moving even after completing all clearances.

title: Internship verification letter has a registration number typo
description: The internship verification letter was issued, but it contains the wrong registration number and needs correction for submission.

title: Section transfer request is still pending
description: I applied for a section transfer due to a timetable clash, but the request has not moved after faculty approval.

title: Hostel transfer application is not moving
description: My hostel transfer request was recommended by the warden, but the accommodation office still shows it as pending.

title: Elective batch transfer has not been updated
description: I was told my elective batch transfer was approved, but the portal still shows the old batch and section.

title: Branch migration documents are delayed in workflow
description: My approved branch migration paperwork is taking too long to move through the offices, and the ERP still has the old branch.

title: Approved lab section change is not reflected
description: The department shifted me to another lab section, but the portal still shows the old section and attendance group.

title: Hostel WiFi keeps looping back to login page
description: The hostel WiFi connects for a moment and then sends me back to the login page repeatedly, so I cannot stay online.

title: Library WiFi signal is very weak in reference section
description: The WiFi works in most of the library, but the reference section has a dead zone and connections keep dropping there.

title: Department network has severe packet loss
description: Internet access in our department block is unstable and packet loss is causing video calls and coursework uploads to fail.

title: Guest WiFi OTP is not being received
description: Visitors trying to access the campus guest WiFi are not receiving the OTP, so the network cannot be used at all.

title: Exam hall internet is unstable during online assessments
description: The exam hall network becomes unstable when many students log in at the same time, which disrupts online assessments.

title: Campus websites open slowly due to DNS issue
description: Many websites and cloud tools take too long to open on campus WiFi even though the signal is fine, which looks like a DNS issue.

title: LMS password reset email is not arriving
description: I requested an LMS password reset multiple times, but the reset email is not reaching my college inbox.

title: Course materials on LMS show access denied
description: The faculty uploaded materials on the LMS, but my class section is getting access denied when opening the folder.

title: College email can receive but not send messages
description: My institutional email is receiving messages, but every outgoing email is failing and bouncing back from the server.

title: LMS keeps redirecting me back to login
description: After signing into the LMS, the site redirects me back to the login page again and again instead of opening the dashboard.

title: Timetable notifications are not reaching email inbox
description: Important LMS and timetable notifications are visible late in the portal, but they are not reaching my college email inbox on time.

title: LMS assignment attachment upload keeps failing
description: My assignment file upload reaches the end on LMS and then fails, so I cannot submit the document before the deadline.

title: Lab computers are not booting properly
description: Multiple systems in the lab are stuck at boot and students cannot start their practical session on time.

title: CAD software in lab says license expired
description: The CAD application used in our practical lab is not opening and shows that the floating license has expired.

title: Keyboard and mouse are not working on several lab systems
description: A full row of computers in the lab has dead keyboards and mice, which is blocking students from using those machines.

title: Compiler tools are blocked on lab machines
description: The programming compiler used in lab practicals is missing or blocked on several systems after the recent update.

title: Lab machines cannot print to the shared printer
description: The shared lab printer is online, but none of the systems can print because the printer option is missing or failing.

title: Lab systems became unstable after recent update
description: After the latest lab update, some machines freeze randomly and essential applications crash during practical work.

title: Hostel allotment shows the wrong room block
description: My hostel allotment letter places me in a different block from the one communicated during admission processing.

title: Approved roommate preference was ignored in allotment
description: I submitted a roommate preference that was approved, but the final hostel allotment does not reflect the approved pairing.

title: Accessible hostel room request is still pending
description: I submitted documents for an accessible hostel room, but the accommodation team has not processed the request yet.

title: Final-year hostel block reallocation has not been updated
description: We were told final-year hostel block changes would be processed, but the room mapping still shows the old allocation.

title: Room transfer to quieter hostel floor is pending
description: I requested a transfer to a quieter study-floor room for academic reasons, but the hostel system still shows the old room.

title: Water leakage in hostel washroom is spreading
description: There is continuous water leakage from the washroom line in our hostel block and the corridor floor is getting flooded.

title: Ceiling fan in hostel room is not working
description: The ceiling fan in my hostel room has stopped working completely, which is making the room difficult to use.

title: No water supply in hostel block since morning
description: Our hostel block has had no water supply since early morning and several washrooms are now unusable.

title: Hostel room window latch is broken
description: The window latch in my hostel room is broken and the window cannot be secured properly during rain and at night.

title: Strong sewage smell coming from hostel drain
description: There is a strong sewage smell near our hostel corridor drain and it is making the area difficult to use.

title: Power socket in hostel room is sparking
description: One of the power sockets in my hostel room is sparking when used, which seems unsafe and needs urgent repair.

title: Mess counter is not recognizing my meal coupon
description: My hostel mess meal coupon is being rejected at the counter even though my hostel renewal is complete.

title: Approved vegetarian option is often unavailable in mess
description: The mess menu lists a vegetarian option for my shift, but it is frequently unavailable by the time our batch is served.

title: Mess breakfast is being served too late during exams
description: Breakfast in the hostel mess is being served too late during exam week, so students are leaving without food.

title: Mess water purifier is not working
description: The water purifier in the hostel mess is not working properly, so students are unable to get filtered drinking water.

title: Mess account shows extra deduction for guest meals
description: My mess account has been charged extra for guest meals that I did not use, and the balance is now incorrect.

title: Fee payment succeeded but receipt is missing
description: My semester fee payment went through successfully, but the receipt is still missing from the portal and email.

title: Semester fee was debited twice
description: The fee portal showed a delay during payment and now my bank statement shows two debits for the same semester fee.

title: Fee challan still shows pending after UPI payment
description: I paid my fee using UPI and the money was debited, but the challan page still shows the payment as pending.

title: Late fee was added even though I paid on time
description: I made my fee payment before the deadline, but the portal still added a late fee charge to my account.

title: Approved installment plan is not showing in fee portal
description: My fee installment request was approved, but the portal still shows the full amount due immediately.

title: Hostel fee ledger amount does not match finance approval
description: My approved hostel fee waiver is not reflected correctly, and the ledger still shows an extra amount due.

title: Approved scholarship has not been disbursed
description: My scholarship application shows approved, but the amount has still not been credited to my account.

title: Scholarship bank account mapping was rejected
description: My scholarship payment is delayed because the system says my bank account mapping was rejected even though the account is valid.

title: Scholarship application is stuck under verification
description: My scholarship application has stayed under verification for too long even though all documents were submitted earlier.

title: Scholarship renewal approved but money not credited
description: The scholarship renewal shows approved, but the credited amount has not appeared in my account yet.

title: Scholarship file shows income certificate mismatch
description: My scholarship application is not moving because the system reports an income certificate mismatch, even though I uploaded the correct document.

title: Caution deposit refund is still pending
description: My caution deposit refund is still pending even though all exit clearances were completed earlier.

title: Refund for duplicate payment has not started
description: I accidentally paid the same college charge twice, but the refund process still has not started in the portal.

title: Cancelled event fee refund is delayed
description: The event was cancelled and a refund was promised, but the amount is still not credited to participants.

title: Hostel mess advance refund is not processed
description: My hostel mess advance refund is pending even though the final balance reconciliation was completed.

title: Library deposit refund is pending despite clearance
description: I completed library clearance, but the library deposit refund still shows pending in the finance section.

title: Hostel noise complaint record seems incorrect
description: A noise complaint has been recorded against my room, but the timing overlaps with an approved hostel floor meeting.

title: Bicycle parking penalty needs review
description: I received a bicycle parking penalty, but the restricted zone marking was unclear at the location when I parked there.

title: Conduct warning issued in class seems mistaken
description: I was marked for a classroom conduct warning, but the reported disruption was caused by another group and not my seat row.

title: Mess queue misconduct report needs clarification
description: A misconduct report has been filed against me in the mess queue, but the complaint timing does not seem accurate.

title: Lost ID card may have been used by someone else
description: I reported my ID card as lost, but it appears to have been used afterward for an access attempt, which is a security concern.

title: Street lights near hostel path are not working
description: The path near the hostel is too dark at night because multiple street lights are not working, which feels unsafe.

title: Possible outsider entry near campus block
description: An unfamiliar person was moving around an academic block without clear escort, which raised a security concern.

title: Parking area has a CCTV blind spot
description: The parking area near the hostel seems to have a CCTV blind spot, which is making students feel unsafe at night.

title: Revaluation result is still not published
description: I applied for revaluation within the announced period, but the updated result for my subject is still not published.

title: Evaluated answer script copy request is pending
description: I applied for a copy of my evaluated answer script, but the request is still pending without any update.

title: Revaluation fee payment is not reflected
description: I paid the revaluation fee, but the examination portal still says the application fee is unpaid.

title: Consolidated marksheet not updated after revaluation change
description: My subject mark changed after revaluation, but the consolidated marksheet still shows the old total and result summary.

title: Photocopy request status is stuck in processing
description: My answer script photocopy request has been stuck in processing for days even though the scanning window should be complete.

title: Two elective exams are scheduled at the same time
description: My exam timetable shows two elective papers in the same slot, so the schedule needs to be checked urgently.

title: Practical exam clashes with project review schedule
description: My practical exam timing is clashing with an officially scheduled project review, and both are mandatory.

title: Revised exam timetable is not updated in portal
description: A revised exam timetable was announced, but the student portal is still showing the older version.

title: Exam venue change was communicated too late
description: The venue for my exam changed, but the information was communicated very late and caused confusion for students.

title: Supplementary exam date is unclear
description: The supplementary exam notice is confusing and it is not clear which date is final for the subject.

title: Hall ticket is blocked even though dues were cleared
description: My hall ticket is blocked because of dues, but I already completed the required payment and clearance.

title: Hall ticket has a spelling mistake in my name
description: My hall ticket has a spelling mistake in my name, which could create issues during examination verification.

title: Elective subject is missing on hall ticket
description: My registered elective subject does not appear on the hall ticket even though it is visible in the course registration portal.

title: Hall ticket is missing my profile photo
description: My hall ticket generated without my profile photo, and I need it corrected before the exam begins.

title: Need confidential handling for repeated inappropriate comments
description: I need to file a complaint about repeated inappropriate comments in an academic setting and want the matter handled confidentially.

title: Need to report repeated unwanted messages confidentially
description: I want to report repeated unwanted personal messages from another student and need the complaint to be handled discreetly.

title: Need confidential complaint about uncomfortable mentor behavior
description: I need to report uncomfortable boundary-crossing behavior by a mentor and want the complaint handled with confidentiality.

title: Need to report senior intimidation in hostel corridor
description: I want to report intimidation by seniors in the hostel corridor and need the matter handled through the anti-ragging process.

title: Need to report seniors forcing errands
description: I need to report that some seniors are forcing juniors to run errands and I want the complaint processed safely.

title: Need to report threatening messages from senior group
description: I received threatening messages from a senior group and need to file an anti-ragging complaint with confidential handling.
